commit_message: Fix overlapping bits in TG16 sav file menu functions Fix overlapping bits in TG16 sav file menu functions The power of two number is for the core to communicate its desired .sav size to main_mister. It doesn't bother the existing main, and would be used for a main_mister change I would like to submit soon.
